name: M K Transportation Svc
recent_news: No web presence found; appears to be a very small (~5 employee, ~$300K revenue) operation in Chesterfield, MI. No confirmation it is a school-bus or special-needs student-transport contractor.
fit_notes: Too small and unverified to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in target. Likely a micro livery/van operator, not a yellow-bus school contractor. Deprioritize.

name: Total Image Limousine Svc
recent_news: Founder/co-owner Deborah Lynn Miller (age 70) of Sylvania, OH passed away April 8, 2026 after 35 years co-running the business — significant succession event. Website still lists J.D. Davidson as owner.
fit_notes: Not a yellow-bus contractor — Lincoln Town Cars and 6/10-pax vans for airport, school proms/grads, and social events. Too small and wrong asset mix for Summit tuck-in; succession event noted but business model is livery, not contracted student transport.

name: CND Transportation & Livery
recent_news: Unclaimed Yelp listing at 11908 S Michigan Ave, Chicago (West Pullman). No website, no confirmed school-district contracts, no M&A news.
fit_notes: Micro livery operation (~4 employees, ~$300K revenue) with no evidence of school-bus or contracted special-needs student transportation. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Dolphin Express Limousine Inc

fit_notes: Micro limousine operation, not a yellow-bus or SPED contractor. Not a fit for Summit tuck-in.
